Relaxed Organic Cotton Overshirt

Composition

Material composition: 78% organic cotton and 22% recycled polyester.

Care

Care instructions: machine wash at 30°C, do not tumble dry, iron on low.

This responsible style uses recycled trims and organic cotton from traceable farming partners.

Certification: GOTS certified organic cotton and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 trims.

Origin: made in Portugal by a long-term supplier.

Durability: reinforced seams, repairable buttons, and a two-year repair guarantee.
